comment: Goldens for SPEC § Pre-release: v1.0 (proposal). Loaded by tests/conformance_v1.rs with v1 mode ON. Language-neutral — keep Rust-specific fields out of cases.

cases.name: gust_skips_intermediate_cell
cases.comment: ≫ raises speed to 2; the digit '9' at column 1 is skipped, so '.' pops an underflow 0.

cases.name: gust_calm_full_cycle_returns_to_speed_1
cases.comment: Speed goes 1 → 2 → 1; the 7 ends up pushed and printed normally.

cases.name: calm_at_speed_one_traps_134
cases.comment: CALM with speed already 1 is a runtime trap. Program aborts with exit 134; stderr names the trap.

cases.name: double_gust_advances_at_speed_3
cases.comment: First ≫ raises speed to 2 → IP jumps from (0,0) to (2,0)=second ≫. Second ≫ raises speed to 3 → IP jumps from (2,0) to (5,0)=@. Halts cleanly with no output.
